pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Anomaly is a long-term stalker that mostly haunts caves and becomes more aggressive over time.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It feels like a threat that grows with the world instead of showing everything at once.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It is meant for longer playthroughs and gets worse as time goes on.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its horror comes from slow escalation and the feeling that it is adapting to the player.
